display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Uppercase. White on imagery or Ink on light backgrounds.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Uppercase. Ivy Mode thin weight at scale.

title.purpose: Card names, sub-section headings, product names. Uppercase with letter-spacing.

body.purpose: All paragraph text. Lato at light weight. Cap width at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Navigation metadata, breadcrumbs, filter labels, button text. Smallest typographic voice.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing. Used on button fills and hover states.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover fills, link color shifts, chevron rotation.

motion.name: duration-medium
motion.purpose: Product card image scale on hover.

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Primary CTA across body sections. Pill shape, outline-to-fill hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 50px; padding: 15px 25px; font-family: 'Ivy Mode', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Filled Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Ink background, used for Explore and search actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-filled { background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #f4f2ef; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 50px; padding: 15px 25px; font-family: 'Ivy Mode', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-filled:hover { background-color: #d6d1c5; color: #1a1a1a; border-color: #d6d1c5; } .ds-btn-filled:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Header CTA
components.description: Compact pill button in the sticky navbar. Lato label typography.
components.css: .ds-btn-header { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-header:hover { background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-header:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Standard text field. Light background, no visible border, 8px radius.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 51px; background-color: #f4f2ef; color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #989389; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #1a1a1a; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Full-screen overlay nav item. Ivy Mode display serif, centered, uppercase.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: block; text-align: center; padding: 11px 15px; font-family: 'Ivy Mode', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 40px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; color: #d6d1c5; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Browsable product unit. Image + name only. Hover scales image.
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-product-card-image { overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; background: #f4f2ef; } .ds-product-card-image img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top center; transition: transform 0.4s ease; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card-image img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-product-card-name { font-family: 'Ivy Mode', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0.65rem 0 0; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.2; }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Bride testimonial with quote text and author attribution.
components.html:
The most beautiful gown I've ever worn. Every detail was perfect.

SarahBRIDE, 2025
components.css: .ds-testimonial { background: #f4f2ef; border: 1px solid #d6d1c5; border-radius: 2px; padding: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; height: 100%; } .ds-testimonial-text { font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.65; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; } .ds-testimonial-author { margin-top: 1.5rem; } .ds-testimonial-name { display: block; font-family: 'Ivy Mode', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-testimonial-tag { display: block; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #989389; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 0.25rem; }

components.name: Social Link
components.description: Footer social icon in a pill-bordered circle. White on Ink background.
components.css: .ds-social-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 1px solid #fff; border-radius: 50%; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-social-link:hover { background-color: #fff; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-social-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
Looking into the design studio itself — precision, intentionality, the hand behind the garment. Every element exists because someone decided it should. The system carries the discipline of the atelier into the browser: sharp lines, deliberate negative space, and a refusal to decorate where structure alone is enough. The gowns are the subject; the interface is the frame.

This system explicitly rejects over-the-top glam (heavy ornamentation, glitzy gold, maximalist embellishment), generic template bridal (stock-photo-heavy, interchangeable layouts), and fast-fashion aesthetics (cluttered layouts, sale banners, urgency tactics). Miss Scarlett’s luxury is sculptural, not decorative. The site should feel authored, not assembled.

The palette is restrained: warm neutrals with near-black ink carrying all authority. Typography does the heavy lifting through a serif/sans pairing — Ivy Mode for display and Lato for body — with thin weights and generous scale. Sections breathe. Imagery lands.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral palette with near-black as the sole action color
Thin font weights throughout (300 for display and body, 400 for labels)
Pill-shaped buttons with outline-to-fill hover transitions
Flat elevation — depth through background color alternation, never shadows
Full-bleed hero imagery with overlaid typography
Full-screen navigation overlay on all viewports
Generous section padding (60px standard) with visual rhythm through alternating backgrounds

rules.name: The Ink Authority Rule
rules.body: Ink (#1a1a1a) is the only color that commands attention. Every interactive element, every heading, every call-to-action uses Ink or White-on-Ink. No secondary accent color. No brand color applied to buttons. The photography provides the color; the interface provides the frame.

rules.name: The Muted Prohibition
rules.body: Muted (#989389) is forbidden as body text on the Light background — the contrast ratio (approximately 3.2:1) fails WCAG AA. Muted is reserved for labels, breadcrumbs, and metadata only, where the text is short and supplementary.

rules.name: The Light Weight Rule
rules.body: Body text is weight 300. Label text is weight 400. Weight 700 exists in the Lato import but is not used in the current design system. Bold is earned; reaching for it should feel unusual.

rules.name: The Uppercase Boundary
rules.body: All Ivy Mode text is uppercase. All Label-role Lato text is uppercase. Body-role Lato text is never uppercase. The boundary is typographic role, not visual size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Conviction Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited. If a new component needs depth, use a background color shift or a thin border — never a box-shadow. The atelier window is flat glass; looking through it should feel like looking, not reaching.

dos: Do use Ink (#1a1a1a) as the sole interactive/emphasis color. Photography provides vibrancy; the interface provides the frame.
Do maintain the pill shape (50px radius) on every button. It is the component signature.
Do alternate section backgrounds (Light / White / Coconut / Ink) for visual rhythm. Vary the sequence.
Do set body text in Lato 300 at 18px with generous line-height (1.83). Cap paragraph width at 65–75ch.
Do use full-bleed imagery for hero sections. The photograph is the design; the UI is the caption.
Do keep product cards minimal: image + name, nothing else. The gown sells itself.
Do test all Ivy Mode headings at every breakpoint. Thin weight + uppercase + large scale is prone to overflow.
donts: Don't introduce a secondary accent color. No teal, no rose, no gold. The palette is Ink + warm neutrals.
Don't use Muted (#989389) as body text on Light backgrounds — it fails AA contrast.
Don't add box-shadows to any element. The system is flat by conviction.
Don't use heavy ornamentation, glitzy gold, or maximalist embellishment. Luxury is sculptural, not decorative.
Don't use generic template bridal layouts — stock-photo grids, predictable pastels, interchangeable ordering.
Don't use sale banners, urgency copy, countdown timers, or discount badges. Price is not the conversation.
Don't use font weight 700 (bold). Weight 300 and 400 carry all hierarchy through scale and case.
Don't use border-radius values between 8px and 50px. Two shapes: tight (0–8px) and pill (50px).
Don't nest cards or place cards inside cards.
